The '''IR-5 "Intimidator"''' was a rapid-fire [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]] manufactured by [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc.]]. It was slightly less powerful than a standard blaster pistol, but compensated for this with a rate of fire akin to a [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blaster]] and an integrated targeting computer to improve the weapon's accuracy.

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
This blaster pistol appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. In the game, it was simply called the Intimidator pistol, and had an appearance considerably different than the depiction in the ''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]''.
